haiku:
Golden cheese aglow,
Puffing high with joy and warmth,
Savory delight.
Happy #NationalCheeseSouffleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Plates stack high with cheer,
Sunshine spills on clean table,
Laughter fills the room.
Happy #NoDirtyDishesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker gold,
Joyful voices sing aloud,
Time to celebrate!
#HappyBirthdayBertrandRussell from @ClamBakeSanta

Velvet layers stack,
Frosting swirls like moonlit cream,
Sweet joy in each bite.
Happy #NationalDevilSFoodCakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Frogs leap with great joy,
Splashing through the sunlit pond,
Nature sings with glee.
Happy #FrogJumpingDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright candles aglow,
Joyful songs of love rise high,
Moments bloom like spring.
#HappyBirthdayMalcolmX from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden crust we share,
Creamy dreams and cheese unite,
Joyful bites delight.
Happy #NationalQuicheLorraineDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Paws patter with joy,
Eyes shine like morning sunlight,
Hearts unite as one.
Happy #RescueDogDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden pages turn,
Ink flows like a river's song,
Words bloom, bright and free.
#HappyBirthdayHonordeBalzac from @ClamBakeSanta

Juicy berries shine,
Creamy clouds of sweetness swirl,
Joyful bites unite.
Happy #NationalStrawberriesAndCreamDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Ink flows on paper,
Thoughts take flight like the spring breeze,
Memories we share.
Happy #NationalMemoDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Jazz notes swirl like dreams,
Cake icing glistens with joy,
Voices rise in song.
#HappyBirthdayFatsWaller from @ClamBakeSanta

Sweet cream swirls and shines,
Velvet smooth, a soft delight,
Taste of dreams divine.
Happy #NationalVanillaPuddingDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Magnifying glass,
Whispers of London fog swirl,
Mysteries unveiled.
Happy #SherlockHolmesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Mysteries unfold,
Joyful tales in twilight glow,
Laughter fills the room.
#HappyBirthdayArthurConanDoyle from @ClamBakeSanta

Melody in air,
Sunlight spills on the table,
Joyful hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayRichardWagner from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright blooms gently sway,
Whispers of breezes play soft,
Stars laugh in the night.
Happy #WelcomeToGeminiSeason from @ClamBakeSanta

Chewy, sweet delight,
Colors swirl like rainbows bright,
Joy wrapped in each bite.
Happy #NationalTaffyDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Copper shines like sun,
Children toss their wishes high,
Joy springs from the ground.
Happy #LuckyPennyDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful laughter rings,
Cake blooms with icing petals,
Bright wishes take flight.
#HappyBirthdayMargaretFuller from @ClamBakeSanta

Silver light spills down,
Casting shadows on soft grass,
Whispers of the night.
Happy #FirstQuarterMoon from @ClamBakeSanta

Garlic butter melts,
Soft shells bask in moonlit glow,
A feast on the plate.
Happy #NationalEscargotDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Handshakes, hugs, and smiles unite,
Joy blooms like springtime.
Happy #BrotherSDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Songs drift through the air,
Guitars strum with warm laughter,
Joy blooms in each note.
#HappyBirthdayBobDylan from @ClamBakeSanta
